title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Aptech - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Aptech - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aptech. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
